label: Ritual position (preferred adjacent cell cardinal)
description: Places the pawn in a cardinal adjacent cell to the ritual target, optionally using a search pattern to find the preferred cell.

facing.label: Facing
facing.description: Cardinal direction the pawn faces after arriving. Rot4.Invalid means no forced facing.

faceThing.label: Face thing
faceThing.description: If true, the pawn faces toward the ritual target thing instead of using a fixed facing direction. Cannot be combined with facing.

preferredCellSearchPattern.label: Preferred cell search pattern
preferredCellSearchPattern.description: Optional search pattern used to select the preferred adjacent cardinal cell.
